---
title: "Roadmap"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Implementation Roadmap & Project Status

The modernization of the agency's datacenter is a multi-phase journey. We are currently moving through Phase 1 (Foundations), with subsequent phases building on this core.

## High-Level Roadmap
![Project Roadmap](./images/roadmap.png)

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPLHRzCm483VyojEGqBZ8R0awnXxG7FJPamRj5044czkSirC7Jjod8qoxRzZ9slhXArTNohdFf_lFjl9UQMfqdN1lMh9H4aLBM1EqsMkP2soM7Afu5NI_1mYmmMjkKwaq5zeWK0Kesu6efIyUvmS32CoY9tWKAeCrNDHXQcc8kUu6ojDZJJV0mcfzn0arUoMwTLkAfP5AGKA_SBIhPSzXUz2raNjPApXNS3MOtytnwV9KJ9-mkL_u30vxcpxnjRUb5jZUz4HrNHEgnVKcQt99tQ1uqA3bg1OVgCXOxPz9eMtqG07KoL_cn5SiNGf5ui3e1NCxEdlG47pV1fuJGXy_wCTF2eoyKzaDeO03XDRARLhL6yEuDxD4L--YqVmKwhbWiixc9IQ5UmlPatcpu6BvYXGKOrlonLS2gRDDTgIOIUfLEQUbIMAZALO0V4lOAJeGg_fo7jm-Q_741w5WpCWcflmDRl5bcCSAsts9h3tUZGuFVAcGTFcDj8H4hP2Gi-PsLW9-rP2E9noAj1qeZ5NZPo-cylC70fpXE0ra2nJM5LCvD1EksPYkUxcs9qqAtajbl0TEHQerGg8I6-CZqTsq64nhPLTm74r9FxmLzVMISzMQ6sTdC5OPBwMllc37wnYSyPDhgwuS2ikx8hhRDWqQiL5dZEp4HVrnKLmEBb5nQdLCaifnxwssOX0GkUAfK1gBOl6BOomv7ArRkczEo6fEOSBfYTbvMv7IvwwvAJ4DaQvwomcVjnpzg7hRDDMTDyUDgllZz5lNX88tv1cFN7FSzuqwfhSWReLIFCU4FR2FBGhRSURZCwZSzER-TBz0m00)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

## Current Execution Status
This "Stoplight" dashboard represents the real-time health of our development and documentation pipeline.

![Executive Dashboard](./images/exec_dashboard.png)

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHFJ-D03CNl_HHMzrp1Qa7YI3ffK0yWH05ng8HCugQZ9fxHZCCV8Ruxaw7GR9TDo2tnp_Pxpr9ElQ2Jfgv6VgFPeiCQ7Z3VbCuqN2XJ6GU_ilXqY89Ms5II6POBh0aIfx4x8N7EF6sRVq__9CUgKvmQLv3xNzLHBiXbHVsO3Hgn783Oo02HvA8VjRpqKyhKrZ2n_51wcyk0y3xaKrGlqoRS1-notB_cx2Gxp6RVPFaFECsE_ZhxLrg38tU93Q8f2ZwW_u7EufFyvWeLhGJ4WDFbMg3GhNrjUBJr1kEKR6LUwY095eBI-36yZhv2Wh6Q7wWKBhMbIZED0Jse-RrAkqpIYAcndGkBt6ahFdAfoVteRRTgzanv4v8Yk28imZJluGpj_iR4Mk92FuD2Dhna5QuPvCMHeNOVFtSRphNtOVT4pEIQylMIpz5QpMNis1QxVEjJvx3GGak-cH_St7sGcoYu0xOd28xMLEEIRx7IHJGPwTrhi1WJWSdam_9fa1_-7Ey0)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

### Remaining Milestones

* **Q4 2025:** Modernization Atlas v1.0 Live (Foundation).
* **Q2 2026:** End-to-End Plane Visibility (Integration).
* **Q4 2026:** Full Executive Readiness & Operational Modernization (Scale).
